recommendations.text: awf-cli-proxy container DIFC liveness probe failed (localhost:18443 connection refused) on 2 runs (PR Description Updater, Issue Monster), aborting the agent before it starts (turns=0). Add a bounded retry/health-wait on the cli-proxy liven…
recommendations.note: Still OPEN — DIFC liveness-probe-18443 recurred day2 (Issue Monster, PR Sous Chef turns=0). Intermittent; add probe retry/backoff before declaring the proxy dead.

recommendations.text: PR Code Quality Reviewer (27160990743) emitted a complete, valid review (findings JSON in assistant.message) but then hit 'Timeout 870000ms waiting for session.idle' and exit1, discarding the work and reddening the job. The sdk-driver shoul…
recommendations.note: Reconfirmed 06-10 evening: 2 PR CQR hard-fails from session.idle 870s with hasOutput=true. The SDK driver should detect terminal/idle from the emitted final assistant message and flush safe-output instead of blocking 14.5min then exit 1. High-value: this class caused 2 of 5 fails today.

recommendations.recommendation: Add a soft pre-cap AI-credits guard to heavy daily aggregators (esp. Daily Ambient Context Optimizer): check remaining daily credits before the heaviest turns and degrade gracefully (emit partial output + noop) instead of 429-aborting at turn 57 and wasting 3M tokens. Alternatively raise the cap for the few heavy prod-main aggregators or shard their work.
recommendations.note: Reconfirmed 06-10: Daily Ambient Context Optimizer 429 cap recurred (rec=2). Pre-cap credit check + graceful partial-output degrade needed before heaviest aggregation turns.

recommendations.recommendation: Raise the Copilot CLI step timeout for review-heavy workflows and/or flush buffered safe-outputs periodically so a 15-min action timeout still emits the in-flight review instead of reddening with no output.

recommendations.text: Remove the agent setup's dependency on Docker Hub. download_docker_images.sh pulls all ghcr.io images fine but times out on the single Docker Hub image node:lts-alpine (registry-1.docker.io context-deadline/i-o-timeout across all 3 retries…

Add a degenerate-loop / repeated-identical-tool-call guard to the copilot harness. GitHub Remote MCP Auth Test ran the IDENTICAL command `date -u +%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC` 130+ times across 136 turns, burning 3.7M tokens before the 5-minute s…

Fix the repo-memory push for brand-new orphan branches under signed-commit rulesets. Daily Safe Outputs Git Simulator's AGENT succeeded but push_repo_memory failed 4/4 (GH013 rule violation) because the first commit to the never-before-seen…

cli-proxy DIFC liveness-probe failure (localhost:18443 connection refused, turns=0) has now recurred 3 consecutive days (06-08 PR Description Updater/Issue Monster, 06-09 Issue Monster/PR Sous Chef, 06-10 Sub-Issue Closer/Auto-Triage). It i…
recommendations.note: | RECONFIRM day4: Daily Secrets Analysis Agent never invoked (turns=0).

recommendations.rec: Add 'gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview' to the api-proxy AI-credits pricing table or set apiProxy.defaultAiCreditsPricing fallback in AWF config so unknown gemini models degrade gracefully instead of hard-failing. Smoke Gemini 0/2 this window.

Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer (codex) hard-fails on 404 'gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07' (recur of 06-05). Pin the workflow to a model id present in the api-proxy routing/pricing table, or add the alpha model to the table. Same wf, 2nd occurrence — fix the workflow's model pin.

Daily Safe Output Integrator hit guard.tool_denials_exceeded 5/5 on prod main (git diff/status, make agent-report-progress, sed, read *_test.go). Add these read-only inspection commands to the workflow's allow-tool list, or relax the 5-denial guard for read-only ops, so a routine git-status call doesn't abort a 25-min run.

When daily_effective_workflow_exceeded gates a PR-triggered workflow, present a neutral/skipped conclusion or annotation rather than run=failure, so PR authors (Matt Pocock x3, TQS) don't see false red. Agent is correctly skipped (no token waste); only the surfacing is the problem.
Add a max-token / max-retry circuit-breaker to the AOAI-apikey smoke probe so a 'transient API error' loop cannot burn 2.15M tokens (73 turns) before failing.
